title: Earthians addendum ~
message: And foal this be another failed simulation, said the earthians—earth people who made more then and other then 900 comics. But this is not scary to scary; it is just a theory with weird stickers. Surfactant in darkness. Nah. They walked in pressure as tough as metal fused into your ski~. Then they laughed at the idea that anything here is binary. The answer is hidden inside of the earth—so you look again, kinder, slower, with more full stops and less fear.
